publishedAbstract: Ceph in `HEALTH_ERR` firing the following message: "Module 'rook' has failed: (401)" ~~~ $ ceph-s cluster: id xxxxxxxxxxxxxx health: HEALTH_ERR Module 'rook' has failed: (401) Reason: Unauthorized {},"status":"Failure","message":"Unauthorized","reason":"Unauthorized","code":401}\n' 1 mgr modules have recently crashed ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph Cluster In HEALTH_ERR State With Error " Module 'rook' has failed: (401)" - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
